summary: First half of a three-document set from Incahuasi Sector C: UR267A (88 cords) + UR267B (131 cords) + UR256 (176 cords). Only 2 STRING (qaqa x2). W-dominant (58%), 29 clusters. 12 L-1 (14% data loss). Three registers of increasing size from the same production area.
interpretation:
IDENTIFICATION
  88 cords. 2 STRING (qaqa x2, 100%), 62 INT, 12 EMPTY (14%), 12 L-1 (14%).
  Architecture: 1-PAIRE, depth L2. 29 clusters.
  Colors: W(51 = 58%), AB(34), ?(3) — 3 colors.
  Provenance: Incahuasi — Sector C.
  Paired with UR267B (which is paired with UR256).

THE SECTOR C TRIO
  UR267A: 88 cords, W=58%, 29 clusters (intake/initial count?)
  UR267B: 131 cords, W=55%, 26 clusters (distribution?)
  UR256: 176 cords, AB=81%, 24 clusters (summary)
  Three registers of increasing size from the same production area.
